name: Cyberpunk Ledger
description: Estética futurista de neon, retroiluminação ciberespacial e grids de alta tecnologia.
css: .journal-theme-cyberpunk { background: #0c0b11 !important; color: #00ffcc !important; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace !important; border: 2px solid #ff007f !important; text-shadow: 0 0 5px #00ffcc !important; padding: 20px !important; } .journal-theme-cyberpunk h1, .journal-theme-cyberpunk h2 { color: #ff007f !important; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #ff007f !important; border-bottom: 1px solid #00ffcc !important; }
contentTemplate:
[ SYSTEM ONLINE ]

Diretriz de dados carregada com sucesso. Modifique esta página ciberespacial.

name: Eldritch Chronicle
description: Pergaminho profano envolto em sombras sussurrantes e runas arcanas esverdeadas.
css: .journal-theme-eldritch { background: #070e0a !important; color: #7fff00 !important; font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive !important; border: 2px solid #2e8b57 !important; text-shadow: 0 0 5px #7fff00 !important; padding: 20px !important; } .journal-theme-eldritch h1, .journal-theme-eldritch h2 { color: #adff2f !important; text-shadow: 0 0 10px #7fff00 !important; }
contentTemplate:
* Sussurros do Abismo *

Runas antigas começam a pulsar... Adicione sua crônica profana aqui.

name: Newspaper Gazette
description: Layout editorial clássico com colunas e cabeçalho de jornal.
